nasb.text: And he looked at the Kenite, and took up his discourse and said, “Your dwelling place is enduring, And your nest is set in the cliff.

esv.text: And he looked on the Kenite, and took up his discourse and said, “Enduring is your dwelling place, and your nest is set in the rock.

cnv.text: 巴蘭看見了基尼人，就作歌，說： “你的居所堅固， 你的窩巢建在磐石中；

ccb.text: 巴兰又观看基尼人，并以诗歌预言说： “虽然你的居所坚固， 你的巢筑在峭壁，
